[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10010001 3
1 11101000 4
2 01000001 2
3 10100001 3
4 11000100 3
5 11101010 5
6 00000001 1
7 11111111 a

67 76 11111111 a match 7
70 07 11111110 7
